title: BrokerReadiness
description: Broker readiness model mapped from local subsystem supervision dimensions with broker-projected posture fields for operator-facing visibility.

local_only.description: Signals that readiness is local-only for broker API consumption.

secrets_ready.description: Local-only readiness signal for the secrets subsystem projected through broker status surfaces.

secrets_health_state.description: Local-only health signal for the secrets subsystem supervision state.

secrets_operational_metrics.description: Minimal local-only operational metrics for secrets lease lifecycle behavior, broker-projected for operator visibility.

lease_issue_count.description: Count of lease issue operations observed by the local secrets subsystem.

lease_renew_count.description: Count of lease renew operations observed by the local secrets subsystem.

lease_revoke_count.description: Count of lease revoke operations observed by the local secrets subsystem.

lease_denied_count.description: Count of fail-closed denied lease operations observed by the local secrets subsystem.

active_lease_count.description: Current count of active secrets leases in local durable state.

secrets_storage_posture.description: Optional durable secrets custody posture summary for broker/operator distinction between secure default and explicit portable degraded mode.

model_gateway_ready.description: Broker-projected readiness signal for model-gateway behavior; daemon-local supervision remains internal.

model_gateway_health_state.description: Broker-projected model-gateway health state for operator/user posture surfaces.

model_gateway_posture_projection.description: Broker-projected model-gateway posture summary that avoids introducing a daemon-specific public API.

schema_id.description: Protocol schema identifier for projected model-gateway posture.

projection_kind.description: Projection kind for operator posture surfaces.

gateway_role_kind.description: Gateway role for this projected posture record.

destination_scope_kind.description: Scope kind represented by model-gateway policy posture projection.

configuration_state.description: Configuration posture for model-gateway policy data availability; not_configured is a neutral empty-data state.

egress_policy_posture.description: Projected egress authorization posture for model-gateway traffic.

surface_channel.description: Broker API channel that exposes projected posture.

provider_profiles.description: Configured provider-profile substrate records projected by the broker for setup and readiness inspection.
